posts.author: Aarti
posts.text: Wanted to point out the impact of CHF-INR exchange rate on Dishman’s financials. The profits from Swiss subsidiary is translated at CHF-INR exchange rate. As on 30March 2026, exchange rate was 117. Coincidentally it was 117 on 30th June as well. It was 112 on 27th June.. In case it was 112 on 30th june, financials of Dishman would have been much worse for Q1. In the future if INR appreciates against CHF (it was 107 last year) then financials of Dishman will deteriorate substantially.. Luckily INR had depreciated to 117 in March and results were better than expected.. Effectively company is not…
